Author: Hovell
Name: Claude Code Deck (Windows)
Description: A physical control surface for Claude Code: approve or reject tool calls with a real key, watch agent state on the key art, switch model and permission mode, dictate, scroll the conversation with a knob. WINDOWS ONLY — it drives Claude Code Desktop through Windows UI Automation. Requires Node.js 22+ and a Claude.ai account. Developed on an Ajazz AKP03, but nothing here is device-specific. Dictation uses Claude Code's own; for languages it can't dictate — Chinese, Thai — it falls back to local transcription with ffmpeg + whisper.cpp, which stays on your machine.

Actions.Name: Status / Send
Actions.Tooltip: Shows what Claude is doing, and sends the composer when pressed.

Actions.Name: Usage
Actions.Tooltip: Context and plan usage as two rings. Press to open the usage panel.

Actions.Name: Approve
Actions.Tooltip: Approve the tool call Claude Code is waiting on. Dark unless something is pending.

Actions.Name: Interrupt
Actions.Tooltip: Stop the agent. Unblocks a pending approval, otherwise sends Escape.

Actions.Name: Push to Talk
Actions.Tooltip: Hold to dictate a prompt. Requires an STT backend in config.json.

Actions.Name: Dispatch Prompt
Actions.Tooltip: Fire a saved prompt or slash command at a headless Claude Code run.

Actions.Name: Send
Actions.Tooltip: Send whatever is in the composer. Pairs with dictation: read the transcript, then commit it.

Actions.Name: Session Action
Actions.Tooltip: Cycle permission mode, fork the session, or archive it.

Actions.Name: Keycap
Actions.Tooltip: A blank key: pick a face from the library, bind it to a prompt.

Actions.Name: Session
Actions.Tooltip: Shows how many Claude Code sessions are reporting in.

Actions.Name: Agent Dial
Actions.Tooltip: Knob: scrub diffs, switch sessions, or pick effort level.
